title: What a life
description: A slow paced Vanilla+ experience with just enough adventures.
body:
![WHAT A LIFE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb71d6e1eb79eee31c26a9228f44992f8f3e563.webp)

### 🌿 Discover Minecraft like never before – with more depth, atmosphere, and comfort! 🌿

> "This modpack offers a Vanilla+ experience that enhances exploration, atmosphere, and gameplay without changing the core of Minecraft."

![balken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82e1e0796e9caa2dc19bfcbbe910e3d313b38bf3.webp)



## WHAT A LIFE ?!
- 🧭 Explore new biomes, structures, and seasons.
- ⚒️ Mods like Tinkers' Construct and Tough As Nails add challenge and depth.
- 🚀 Thanks to FerriteCore, Starlight, and others, everything runs smoothly, even on lower-end systems.
- 🌌 And with mods like Oculus, MAtmos, and Dramatic Skys, Minecraft has never looked better!

### Perfect for solo or multiplayer adventures!

![balken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82e1e0796e9caa2dc19bfcbbe910e3d313b38bf3.webp)

### Join the community discord for more informations and give us a feedback. 


[![discord link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390cd9730a7e2f0154644cb61122a985d9e66957.png)](https://discord.gg/XRQkzp6xDy)
